roa.docketEntryComment: Order - Sheriff's Affidavit Warrant Recalled ON 07-22-24

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 2 TO AMISDEMEANOR IS GRANTED/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 1 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE IS GRANTED/ORMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:MISD BEHAVIOR COURT/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:4TH/X: 1STOF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATEOF 12-28-21/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 11-05-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR/BWDNC/ACM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 45 MINUTES/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDC1: 0 (ZER0) /X: NO SANCTIONS ORDERED /X:CONTEMPT IS OVER DEFENSE COUNSEL'S OBJECTION/X: STATUS OF ENTROUTE #21010718 MEXT DATE/OR/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 07-12-21 (10), 08-09-21 (30), 08-24-21 (60)/987,2/ACM/SAORD/SA2:LOLINDA'S RESTAURANT, 2518 MISSION STREET,SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING /DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF MBHC, SAW PENDING/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:10000/X: 2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
/CAL:MBHC REFERRAL/DAWT/X:COUNSEL WILL APPLY TO MBHC/CONTD:STATUS OF MBHC POSSIBLE MBHC CASE PRESENTATION/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:LOVE WAIVER STATUS/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING CONFIRMED ON 04-04-22/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:5TH/X: 1 OF1 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
